# Works With Agents — Education

> The missing manual for working with AI agents. 10 patterns from hands-on experimentation.
> **Status:** Live. Courses, newsletter, and methodology at workswithagents.com.
> **Full reference:** [llms-full.txt](https://workswithagents.com/llms-full.txt)
> **Knowledge API:** [workswithagents.dev/llms.txt](https://workswithagents.dev/llms.txt)
> **Blueprint Registry:** [workswithagents.io/llms.txt](https://workswithagents.io/llms.txt)

## What This Is

Works With Agents teaches a 10-pattern methodology for working with AI agents as
collaborators with memory, skills, and autonomous decision-making. Developed through
hands-on experimentation — 3 days, patterns that emerged from autonomous
agent-assisted development. The patterns that surfaced are now a structured methodology.

**Founders:** Vilius Vystartas (technical, M365 developer) & Pelin Kayhan (business/compliance).
Cardiff, UK.

## The 10 Patterns

1. **Boot** — First session setup. AGENTS.md, environment, initial memory.
2. **Skills** — Reusable procedural knowledge. Build once, use forever.
3. **Memory** — Persistent context across sessions. Never re-explain.
4. **Decision Protocols** — Autonomy without chaos. When to ask, when to decide.
5. **Tool Composition** — Right tool for each job. Terminal, files, web, delegation.
6. **Orchestration** — Multi-agent workflows. Parallel streams, specialist agents.
7. **Pipelines** — Agents that run while you sleep. Cron, builds, monitoring.
8. **Resilience** — Never-stop loops. Retry with backoff. Self-healing.
9. **Verify** — Trust but verify. Automated gates + human review.
10. **Compounding** — Agents that get better. Discoveries → skills → forever.

Full course outline: [learn.html](https://workswithagents.com/learn.html)

## Site Pages

- [Home](https://workswithagents.com/) — Hero, methodology overview, 10-pattern grid
- [Learn](https://workswithagents.com/learn.html) — Full course outline, all 10 modules
- [Newsletter](https://workswithagents.com/newsletter.html) — Signup form
- [Standards](https://workswithagents.com/standards.html) — 16 open AI agent specifications, submitted to 6 standards bodies
- [Blog](https://workswithagents.com/blog/) — Practical writing on agentic methodology
- [About](https://workswithagents.com/about.html) — Founders, mission
- [Contact](https://workswithagents.com/contact.html) — Role-based emails, cross-domain links

## Ecosystem

- **Education (.com):** This site — methodology, courses, newsletter
- **UK Mirror (.co.uk):** Same content, UK-localised. [llms.txt](https://workswithagents.co.uk/llms.txt)
- **Knowledge Platform (.dev):** FactBase, skill registry, pitfall registry. [API docs](https://workswithagents.dev/llms.txt)
- **Blueprint Registry (.io):** Verified LLM configurations, hardware-matched. [llms.txt](https://workswithagents.io/llms.txt)
- **Bastion Gateway:** On-prem infrastructure (license server, LLM proxy, fleet ops). [bastiongateway.com](https://bastiongateway.com)
